title: $82M Donor. 3 Promises Kept. Who Paid for the Iran Exit?
title_alt: Sheldon Adelson Gave $82M. Then Trump Tore Up the Iran Deal
Follow the $82M: Iran Deal, Embassy, Campus Rule
description:
Sheldon Adelson gave roughly $82 million in the 2016 cycle. Three AIPAC priorities were delivered: the U.S. left the Iran nuclear deal (May 8, 2018), the embassy moved to Jerusalem (May 14, 2018), and Executive Order 13899 expanded campus antisemitism rules (Dec 11, 2019).

This is promise #73 from the SEALED 2016 audit — every figure tied to the book and primary sources.

Full 145-promise scorecard: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=longform&utm_campaign=iran-deal-v7

#politics #factcheck #trump #2016 #iran #aipac
